title: Handball in the Box — Premier League
context: Ball strikes defender's arm inside the penalty area. Was the arm in an unnatural position?
explanation: VAR reviewed and upheld the on-field decision. The arm was deemed to be in an unnatural position, making the body unnaturally bigger.

title: Late Sliding Tackle — Champions League
context: Defender slides in from behind, catches the ball but also the player. Straight red or just a yellow?
explanation: The referee issued a straight red card for serious foul play. The tackle endangered the safety of the opponent despite making contact with the ball.

title: Simulation or Foul? — La Liga
context: Striker goes down under minimal contact in the box. Penalty or simulation?
explanation: After VAR review, the referee reversed the penalty decision. The contact was deemed insufficient to cause the fall — yellow card for simulation instead.
